meta.title: Brain Rot Score | Scroll Addiction Simulator - DopaBrain
meta.description: Scroll through a fake social feed and discover your brainrot level. How addicted to scrolling are you?

app.title: Brain Rot Score
app.subtitle: How brain-rotted are you?
app.introDesc: Scroll through a fake social feed. React to posts. We'll measure how brain-rotted you really are based on your scroll speed, reactions, and whether you can actually stop.

p1.text: POV: you opened this app 'for just 5 minutes' three hours ago

p2.text: My screen time report just sent me a wellness check notification

p3.text: I don't have a sleep schedule, I have a 'passing out from exhaustion' schedule

p4.text: The algorithm knows me better than my therapist and it costs $0/month

p5.text: If I had a dollar for every hour of screen time, I could retire at 25

p6.text: Just accidentally said 'no cap' to my grandma at dinner. She asked if I needed a hat.

p7.text: My attention span is so cooked that this post is already too long for me

p8.text: I have 47 tabs open on my phone browser. Each one is a different personality.

p9.text: 3 AM me making life decisions based on a TikTok I saw 2 seconds ago

p10.text: My eyes are burning but this feed is fire so I literally cannot stop

p11.text: Skibidi dop dop dop yes yes. If you understood that, we need to talk.

p12.text: I narrate my life in my head like a TikTok voiceover. The delusion is real.

p13.text: Someone talked to me IRL and I almost hit the skip button on their face

p14.text: I've been scrolling so long my thumb has developed its own consciousness

p15.text: This is the last post. If you're reading this, congratulations: your brain is officially rotted.

warning.sub1: You've already reacted to 5 posts. Maybe take a break?
warning.sub2: 10 posts deep. Your thumb must be tired. We're concerned.

champion.name: Digital Detox Champion
champion.desc: Incredible. You scrolled slowly, actually read posts, and even considered stopping. Your brain is remarkably unrotted. Do you also read books and go outside? Disgusting.
champion.symptom2: 📚 Probably has a normal sleep schedule

casual.name: Casual Scroller
casual.desc: You're a balanced internet user. You engage with content but don't let it consume you. The algorithm likes you but hasn't claimed your soul yet.
casual.symptom3: 🌅 Still aware of the outside world

algorithm.name: Algorithm's Favorite
algorithm.desc: The algorithm has marked you as a loyal consumer. You scroll at concerning speeds and react to everything. The brainrot is settling in comfortably.
algorithm.symptom1: 🔄 Fast scroll speed — can't slow down
algorithm.symptom2: 💬 Reacted to most posts without thinking

chronic.name: Chronically Online
chronic.desc: Your scroll speed suggests your thumb has its own muscle memory. You blazed through posts, skipped warnings, and showed classic doom-scroll behavior. The brainrot is advanced.

touchgrass.name: Touch Grass Immediately
touchgrass.desc: EMERGENCY: Your scrolling behavior is off the charts. You speed-scrolled through everything, ignored all warnings, and your reaction patterns suggest terminal brainrot. Please close this app and go touch grass immediately.
touchgrass.symptom2: 🧠 Brain now processes only short-form content

share.title: Share your results
share.twitterText: My Brain Rot Score: {score}% - {tier}! How addicted to scrolling are you?
